tricks.description_es: +2 moral a tiradas de Will iniciales contra miedo; +4 a checks posteriores (para monturas).
tricks.description_en: +2 morale bonus to initial Will saves vs. fear; +4 to subsequent checks (mounts).

tricks.description_es: Entierra objetos en lugares seguros. Funciona con Fetch para recuperarlos.
tricks.description_en: Buries objects in safe locations. Works with Fetch to retrieve them.

tricks.description_es: El animal se acerca al manejador aunque normalmente no lo haría.
tricks.description_en: The animal approaches the handler even when it would not normally do so.

tricks.description_es: Transporta objetos a ubicaciones o personas designadas.
tricks.description_en: Transports objects to designated locations or persons.

tricks.description_es: Ataca y daña objetos o estructuras. Requiere Attack y entrenamiento para todas las criaturas.
tricks.description_en: Attacks and damages objects or structures. Requires Attack and all-creature training.

tricks.description_es: Se retira del combate y queda quieto.
tricks.description_en: Withdraws from combat and stays still.

tricks.description_es: Recupera objetos, ya sean específicos o aleatorios.
tricks.description_en: Retrieves objects, whether specific or random.

tricks.description_es: Localiza al manejador usando olfato u otros medios de rastreo.
tricks.description_en: Locates the handler using scent or other tracking means.

tricks.description_es: Ayuda a criaturas ciegas permaneciendo adyacente e indicando obstáculos.
tricks.description_en: Assists blind creatures by staying adjacent and indicating obstacles.

tricks.description_es: Sigue de cerca al manejador, incluso a lugares inusuales.
tricks.description_en: Follows the handler closely, even into unusual locations.

tricks.description_es: Amenaza criaturas designadas; −4 contra no-animales y humanoides.
tricks.description_en: Threatens designated creatures; −4 against non-animals and humanoids.

tricks.description_es: Ejecuta trucos simples de entretenimiento.
tricks.description_en: Performs simple entertainment tricks.

tricks.description_es: (Montura) +5 a negociar alojamiento y establo.
tricks.description_en: (Mount) +5 to negotiate lodging and stabling.

tricks.description_es: Explora un área buscando algo vivo.
tricks.description_en: Explores an area searching for something alive.

tricks.description_es: Acepta comandos de criaturas designadas, no solo del manejador.
tricks.description_en: Accepts commands from designated creatures, not just the handler.

tricks.description_es: Hace tiradas de Stealth y mantiene cobertura u ocultamiento.
tricks.description_en: Makes Stealth checks and maintains cover or concealment.

tricks.description_es: Permanece inmóvil hasta ser llamado.
tricks.description_en: Remains motionless until called.

tricks.description_es: Todos los ataques naturales son no-letales (penalización −4).
tricks.description_en: All natural attacks are nonlethal (−4 penalty).

tricks.description_es: +2 de bonificación a resistir efectos de frío cuando el animal está adyacente.
tricks.description_en: +2 bonus to resist cold effects when the animal is adjacent.

tricks.description_es: Usa Aid Another para ayudar a aliados específicos en combate.
tricks.description_en: Uses Aid Another to assist specific allies in combat.

tricks.description_es: Ataca enemigos designados. La versión 'todas las criaturas' (ataca cualquier criatura) cuenta como 2 tricks.
tricks.description_en: Attacks designated enemies. The 'all-creature' version (attacks any creature) counts as 2 tricks.

tricks.description_es: (Voladores) Suelta proyectiles sobre objetivos designados usando BAB.
tricks.description_en: (Flyers) Drops projectiles on designated targets using BAB.

tricks.description_es: Rompe restricciones; +4 a tiradas de Escape Artist de criaturas restringidas.
tricks.description_en: Breaks restraints; +4 to Escape Artist checks for restrained creatures.

tricks.description_es: Protege al manejador o a un personaje designado.
tricks.description_en: Protects the handler or a designated character.

tricks.description_es: Solo acepta comandos del manejador que enseñó este trick.
tricks.description_en: Only accepts commands from the handler who taught this trick.

tricks.description_es: Hace fintas contra oponentes. Requiere Attack.
tricks.description_en: Feints against opponents. Requires Attack.

tricks.description_es: Mantiene adyacencia para flanquear. Requiere Attack.
tricks.description_en: Maintains adjacency to flank. Requires Attack.

tricks.description_es: Huye y se esconde, permaneciendo dentro del rango auditivo o visual del manejador.
tricks.description_en: Flees and hides, remaining within auditory or visual range of the handler.

tricks.description_es: Localiza y recupera criaturas designadas. Máximo igual a la Int del animal.
tricks.description_en: Locates and retrieves designated creatures. Maximum equals the animal's Int.

tricks.description_es: Impide que otros se acerquen a un área designada.
tricks.description_en: Prevents others from approaching a designated area.

tricks.description_es: Usa instintos naturales para encontrar comida; bonificación a Supervivencia.
tricks.description_en: Uses natural instincts to find food; bonus to Survival.

tricks.description_es: Ejecuta una maniobra de combate específica. Requiere Attack. Puede enseñarse múltiples veces para diferentes maniobras.
tricks.description_en: Executes a specific combat maneuver. Requires Attack. Can be taught multiple times for different maneuvers.

tricks.description_es: Intimida a una criatura para impedir su movimiento; solo ataca si el objetivo intenta moverse.
tricks.description_en: Intimidates a creature to prevent movement; only attacks if the target attempts to move.

tricks.description_es: Proporciona una dosis de veneno. Requiere 10 minutos y un vial; el animal debe tener veneno.
tricks.description_en: Provides one dose of venom. Requires 10 minutes and a vial; the animal must have venom.

tricks.description_es: Se queda junto al objetivo designado y realiza acciones preparadas contra amenazas adyacentes.
tricks.description_en: Stays beside a designated target and takes readied actions against adjacent threats.

tricks.description_es: Vigila silenciosamente un área; alerta al manejador sin hacer ruido cuando es posible.
tricks.description_en: Silently watches an area; alerts the handler without noise when possible.

tricks.description_es: Arrastra criaturas incapacitadas o muertas a un lugar seguro. Requiere Deliver y Guard.
tricks.description_en: Drags incapacitated or dead creatures to safety. Requires Deliver and Guard.

tricks.description_es: Rastrea por olfato. Requiere la habilidad especial de olfato (scent).
tricks.description_en: Tracks by scent. Requires the scent special ability.

tricks.description_es: No inyecta veneno en ataques designados. Requiere la habilidad de veneno.
tricks.description_en: Does not inject venom in designated attacks. Requires venom ability.

tricks.description_es: Construye estructuras naturales (telaraña, presa, madriguera). 10 minutos por cuadro de 5 pies.
tricks.description_en: Builds natural structures (web, dam, burrow). 10 minutes per 5-ft. square.

tricks.description_es: Busca olores, sonidos o señales inusuales usando Percepción.
tricks.description_en: Searches for unusual scents, sounds, or signals using Perception.

tricks.description_es: Ahuyenta monturas sin jinete y criaturas no mágicas (Will DC 10 o huye 120 pies).
tricks.description_en: Drives off unmounted mounts and non-magical creatures (Will DC 10 or flees 120 ft.).

tricks.description_es: Trucos impresionantes; los espectadores sufren −2 a Percepción a menos que superen Sentir Motivaciones.
tricks.description_en: Impressive tricks; spectators suffer −2 to Perception unless they pass Sense Motive.

tricks.description_es: (Montura) No levanta polvo; +5 al DC de rastreo; pierde 5 pies/asalto de movimiento.
tricks.description_en: (Mount) Does not raise dust; +5 to tracking DC; loses 5 ft./round of movement.

tricks.description_es: Marca un área de hasta media milla cuadrada; reduce en un 25% los encuentros aleatorios.
tricks.description_en: Marks an area up to half a square mile; reduces random encounters by 25%.

tricks.description_es: Encuentra un lugar de acampada más seguro.
tricks.description_en: Finds a safer campsite location.

tricks.description_es: Entrenado para recibir y usar los efectos de un hechizo específico.
tricks.description_en: Trained to receive and utilize the effects of a specific spell.

tricks.description_es: Comunica conceptos simples (sí/no, contar hasta 3, 2 preguntas por punto de Int). Requiere Int 2+.
tricks.description_en: Communicates simple concepts (yes/no, count to 3, 2 questions per Int point). Requires Int 2+.

tricks.description_es: Requiere: Come, Fetch, Maneuver (robar), Seek, Sneak.
tricks.description_en: Requires knowing: Come, Fetch, Maneuver (steal), Seek, Sneak.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento para tareas de trabajo físico intenso.
packages.description_en: Training for heavy physical labor tasks.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento para compañeros voladores en apoyo de combate. Tiempo de entrenamiento no especificado en las reglas.
packages.description_en: Training for flying companions in combat support. Training time not specified in rules text.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento completo de monta de combate (equivalente a 'combat trained'). 3 semanas si ya tiene Ride.
packages.description_en: Full combat mount training (equivalent to 'combat trained'). 3 weeks if Ride already known.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento para tareas de guardia y vigilancia.
packages.description_en: Training for guard and watch duties.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento para liberar y rescatar. Tiempo de entrenamiento no especificado en las reglas.
packages.description_en: Training for liberating and rescuing. Training time not specified in rules text.

packages.description_es: Entrenamiento para servir a múltiples amos designados. Tiempo de entrenamiento no especificado en las reglas.
packages.description_en: Training to serve multiple designated handlers. Training time not specified in rules text.
